title: sideritis italica
intro: Sideritis italica, also known as Italian mountain tea or Italian ironwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis italica include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Sideritis italica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed as a herbal remedy in various parts of the world.
